commands: GITHUB_TOKEN=$(aws secretsmanager get-secret-value --secret-id esafx/production/github-clone --region $REGION --query SecretString --output text)

git_pull() { local name=$1 branch=$2; local url="https://x-access-token:${GITHUB_TOKEN}@github.com/Esa-FX/${name}.git"; if [ ! -d "$name/.git" ]; then git clone --branch "$branch" --single-branch "$url" "$name"; git -C "$name" remote set-url origin "https://github.com/Esa-FX/${name}.git"; git -C "$name" log -1 --oneline; return; fi; git -C "$name" remote set-url origin "$url"; git -C "$name" fetch origin "$branch"; git -C "$name" checkout "$branch"; git -C "$name" reset --hard "origin/$branch"; git -C "$name" remote set-url origin "https://github.com/Esa-FX/${name}.git"; git -C "$name" log -1 --oneline; }
echo '=== LIVE IMPORT (fast MT5 link, no balance sync) ==='

docker exec -e PYTHONPATH=/app esafx-crm-api python -c "from sqlalchemy import text; from scripts.import_legacy_common import create_db_engine; e=create_db_engine(); c=e.connect(); clients=c.execute(text('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm.clients')).scalar(); logins=c.execute(text('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm.client_phones')).scalar(); print(f'crm_clients={clients} client_phones={logins}')"
